project_name: SignLanguage Pro (Translador de Lenguaje de Signos)
archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Professional Accessibility)
emotion_and_tone: Trustworthy, Professional, Calm, Empowering, Clear. Not childish, extremely functional.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-slate-900
hierarchy.video_subtitles: text-2xl sm:text-3xl md:text-4xl font-semibold text-white drop-shadow-md bg-black/40 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards and internal sections. Avoid tight clusters.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. Dashboard should use dense bento-box layouts where the main camera feed spans large areas (e.g., col-span-2 row-span-2).
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Use flat solid backgrounds with sharp 1px borders (border-slate-200) for regular content. Use glassmorphism ONLY for floating controls over the video feed.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align forms, lists, and instructions. Center-align only the main video controls (e.g., record button, mute).
layout_and_spacing.mobile_constraints: Images and video feeds must not exceed 80vh on mobile. Use flex-col to stack video and text output cleanly on small screens.

components_strategy.html_elements: Use standard semantic HTML elements (main, section, header, nav) as the skeleton.
components_strategy.shadcn_components: Use heavily customized Shadcn components for complex interactions: Button, Card, Tabs, Input, Textarea, Badge, Table, ScrollArea.
components_strategy.modifications: Tabs: override fixed heights with h-auto and text wrapping. Cards: remove generic drop shadows, use 1px border and flat background color (e.g., bg-slate-50).
components_strategy.video_player_ui: The most critical UI. Must contain a large clear view of the camera. Floating bottom controls (glassmorphism: bg-black/60) with high contrast white icons. Overlaid subtitle text at the bottom. Top right should have a 'Language Detected' badge.
components_strategy.icons: lucide-react. Use consistent sizing (e.g., size={24} or w-6 h-6). Crucial icons: Camera, Mic, MicOff, Video, VideoOff, History, BookOpen, MessageSquare, Hand, Languages.

dashboard_home.description: Main control center. Shows quick actions, recent history snippet, and a 'Start Live Translation' hero section.
dashboard_home.layout: Bento Grid. Left side: Text inputs, translation history. Right side: Large Camera preview (always ready).

live_translation.description: Full-screen or large-screen video mode. Includes 'Conversation Mode' split.
live_translation.layout: Immersive video. If in conversation mode, split the view 50/50. Real-time translated text floats securely over the video feed.

text_to_sign.description: Input text, and output shows step-by-step visual instructions (simulated with video placeholders or abstract illustration).
text_to_sign.placeholder: Escribe para traducir a lenguaje de signos...

dictionary.description: Searchable dictionary of signs. Grid layout of cards.
dictionary.layout: Search bar on top. 3 or 4-column grid of cards with an image representing the sign, and the text label below.

history.layout: Shadcn Table. Columns: Fecha, Texto, Idioma, Duración.

accessibility_requirements.contrast: All text must pass 4.5:1 ratio. Text over video MUST have drop shadows or a semi-transparent dark background for visibility.
accessibility_requirements.focus: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none on all interactive elements.
accessibility_requirements.aria: Use aria-labels on all icon-only buttons (e.g., aria-label='Activar cámara').
accessibility_requirements.data_testid: ALL interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='start-camera-button').

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons should shift to primary_hover color. Cards should elevate slightly (-translate-y-1) with a soft shadow (shadow-md) and border color darkening.
motion_and_interactions.recording_state: When recording, show a pulsing red dot (animate-pulse bg-red-500) and an active border around the video container.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' universally for smooth state changes.

images.description: Abstract blue and white waves for background or hero section filler
Man in glasses giving an okay sign, ideal placeholder for video feed
Smiling businesswoman having a video call, use for conversation mode receiving end
Close-up of hands holding each other, ideal for dictionary sign reference

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Spanish text labels for the UI.
Implement the live camera UI as the focal point, applying the Swiss High-Contrast styling (Stark White/Charcoal with International Klein Blue #002FA7 accents).
Use the video placeholders from the media_assets when simulating the 'Live' state.
Create the specific views requested: Dashboard, Live Translation, Text-to-Sign, Sign Dictionary, and History.
Prioritize accessibility: include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements, ensure high contrast over video feeds using semi-transparent dark overlays for subtitles.
Include a prominent 'Language Detector' UI element (like a Shadcn Badge) in the video view (e.g., 'Detectando...' or 'LSE Detectado').
Ensure the fonts 'General Sans' and 'IBM Plex Sans' are imported and used via Tailwind configuration.
